feedback.text: Hello my name is Daan, I would like to thank the people for bringing up the Digital Fairness Act. But i hope it can also include video games or games in general among many other subjects we still need. We have seen from the Stop Killing Games EU Initiative getting 1.4+ million signatures that many feel as I do. That games and its consumers need more protections, especially because its retracting things you own, or destroying it. Games are a form of art and most just disappear when the publisher or developer feels like stopping support without any protection or backup plan.
